name: Human Resource Policies
nameKm: គោលនយោបាយធនធានមនុស្ស
description: HR procedures, org structure, leave policies, hiring, promotions

entries.title: Annual leave entitlement
entries.titleKm: សិទ្ធិឈប់សម្រាកប្រចាំឆ្នាំ
entries.content: Civil servants are entitled to 18 working days of paid annual leave per year, accrued monthly and requested in writing at least 7 days in advance.
keywords: ច្បាប់ឈប់សម្រាក

entries.title: Sick leave policy
entries.titleKm: គោលការណ៍ច្បាប់ឈឺ
entries.content: Up to 30 days paid sick leave per year with medical certificate. Beyond 30 days requires Medical Board review.

entries.title: Promotion procedure
entries.titleKm: នីតិវិធីតម្លើងឋានៈ
entries.content: Promotions follow annual performance review, require recommendation from direct supervisor and approval from department director.
keywords: តម្លើងឋានៈ

entries.title: Budget approval threshold
entries.titleKm: កម្រិតអនុម័តថវិកា
entries.content: Department directors may approve expenditures up to 50 million riel. Amounts above require ministry-level approval.
